text.title: Agency Content Pillars (Niche) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the `playbook-step` artefact this methodology produces. Validator at scripts/validate-agency-content-pillars-niche.py enforces the contract.

section.title: Schema

example.note: Step missing exit_criterion, output_location, owner, input; deviation_log_reference missing.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: Artefact MUST NOT omit `owner` — orphan artefacts violate rule `named-owner`.
Artefact MUST NOT include keys outside the schema — `additionalProperties: false` is binding.
Artefact MUST NOT contain forbidden placeholder tokens in any string value (validator rejects them).
